name: The Naughty Adventures of Scarlett May Blossom
original_name: The Naughty Adventures of Scarlett May Blossom
overview: Scarlett May Blossom is an 18-year-old beauty from an Alabama trailer park whose naivety about Internet spam launches her on an international misadventure, as she is lured by many men while pursuing millions of dollars in "free" money.

trailers.title: The Naughty Adventures of Scarlett May Blossom  - Trailer for New 2024 AI TV Series
